description_long: This is a green and black chainsaw with a visibly worn exterior, featuring a long metal cutting bar and chain with the text 'BLACK' and '30 cm' printed on the blade. The body is primarily constructed from molded plastic with ergonomic contours, and it includes a prominent rear handle with a textured grip and a wrap-around front handle for two-handed operation. The chainsaw has a visible hand guard in front of the top handle, likely serving as a safety brake. The side of the housing displays some branding and technical information, while the rear section appears to have a cord or cable, suggesting it is an electric model. The overall design is compact and utilitarian, suitable for urban maintenance or light-duty cutting tasks. The surface shows signs of use, with dirt and scuff marks, indicating it has been handled in practical environments.
description: A green and black electric chainsaw with a 30 cm blade, ergonomic handles, and visible safety guard, showing signs of use and wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade, the main body, and clear branding on the blade.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the wrap-around front handle, hand guard, and the blade extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view focusing on the rear handle, power cord, and the back of the chainsaw's housing.
description_view_3: Oblique view from the rear side, showing both handles, the trigger area, and the blade extending forward.
attribute_brand_logo: The blade displays the text 'BLACK' and '30 cm' in black print, located near the base of the blade. No other clear brand logo is visible.
attribute_handle_design: Two handles: a rear handle with a textured grip and trigger, and a wrap-around front handle with a safety guard; both designed for ergonomic and safe two-handed use.
attribute_power_source_indicator: A visible power cord at the rear indicates this is an electric corded chainsaw.
